case_title: GABRIEL ANASTACIO FRANCO ET AL VS. RAUL VASQUEZ

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-23-2016 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO AUG-16-2016 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. DEFENDANT HAS FILED A PETITION IN BANKRUPTCY. CONTINUED FOR STATUS OF BANKRUPTCY. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFFS ONLY. PLAINTIFF GABRIEL ANASTACIO FRANCO WAS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER NINA SAFDIE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$0.00 - WAIVER) SERVED JUL-21-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT VASQUEZ, RAUL
NOTICE OF STAY OF PROCEEDINGS REGARDING BANKRUPTCY FILED BY DEFENDANT VASQUEZ, RAUL

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-18-2015 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO FEB-23-2016 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. DEFENDANT HAD FILED A NOTICE OF STAY OF BANKRUPTCY PROCEEDING WITH THE COURT ON 8/14/15. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,000.00 FILED BY FRANCO, GABRIEL ANASTACIO LOPEZ, MERCEDES REYES AS TO DEFENDANT VASQUEZ, RAUL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-18-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF FRANCO, GABRIEL ANASTACIO LOPEZ, MERCEDES REYES ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFFS GABRIEL ANASTACIO FRANCO & MERCEDES REYES LOPEZ, OR DEFENDANT RAUL VASQUEZ. THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LOPEZ, MERCEDES REYES ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
